mapper.select: select id, merchant_id, name, sort_order from campus_dish_category where merchant_id = #{merchantId} order by sort_order asc, id asc
mapper.insert: insert into campus_dish_category (merchant_id, name, sort_order) values (#{merchantId}, #{name}, #{sortOrder})

insert into campus_dish (merchant_id, category_id, name, description, price, image_url, on_sale, calories) values (#{merchantId}, #{categoryId}, #{name}, #{description}, #{price}, #{imageUrl}, #{onSale}, #{calories})
mapper.update: update campus_dish set merchant_id = #{merchantId}, category_id = #{categoryId}, name = #{name}, description = #{description}, price = #{price}, image_url = #{imageUrl}, on_sale = #{onSale}, calories = #{calories} where id = #{id}
